name: Meow Wolf Santa Fe House of Eternal Return
content: Meow Wolf is a surrealist immersive art experience. It was fun. There was a really wide variety of artistic styles in all the different rooms. I would not recommend getting drunk before going here, nor would I recommend taking a nap here, though both of those recommendations come from the experiences of one of my travel companions. I can only guess as to the discomfort of taking a drunk nap inside the Meow Wolf, but it did seem pretty bad.
